items.example: The village is very remote, far from any city.
The island is isolated from the rest of the world.
The tribe has lived on this island for centuries.
They follow traditions passed down for generations.
One custom is to greet everyone when you arrive.
The environment on the island is beautiful.
They survive by fishing and farming.
Shared customs bind the community together.
The community leaders welcomed the visitors.
Their customs help keep the community strong.
Their traditional way of life is changing.
